meta.name: fullstack-demo
meta.description: fullstack web app: Next 16 + Prisma + Neon Postgres + Tailwind 4 + Vitest, scaffolded by spec-forge

features.title: render the home page
done_when: GET / returns 200 with the project name in the body

features.title: connect to a Postgres database
done_when: DATABASE_URL is read from env, prisma generate succeeds

features.title: lint + format + test pass on a fresh checkout
done_when: pnpm lint, pnpm format:check, and pnpm test all exit 0
